name: Security Issue
description: Report a security vulnerability responsibly.
title: "[SECURITY] "
labels: ["security"]
assignees: []
body:
  - type: markdown
    attributes:
      value: |
        ### IMPORTANT: Do NOT open public issues for security vulnerabilities!
        
        To report security vulnerabilities responsibly, please email **security@astraquantlab.io**.
        This issue tracker is for public coding issues only.
